sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Tungray Technologies (TRSG) director Vassily Kevin files initial Form 3
feed.summary: Tungray Technologies (TRSG) director Vassily Kevin has filed an initial Form 3 with the SEC, indicating his beneficial ownership status as a director. The filing shows no reported transactions or holdings in company securities at this time, serving as a baseline disclosure of his new role. This Form 3 is an initial statement required for insiders to report their ownership upon becoming an officer, director, or large shareholder.

feed.title: TH International (THCH) director Paul Hong submits insider Form 3
feed.summary: TH International Ltd (THCH) director Paul Seungpyo Hong has filed an initial Form 3, which establishes his status as an insider for reporting purposes. This filing is a statement of beneficial ownership and does not indicate any purchases, sales, or other transactions of the company's securities. It primarily serves to publicly acknowledge his ownership reporting obligations as a director.

feed.title: TH International (THCH) CEO details direct and indirect share holdings
feed.summary: TH International Ltd (THCH) CEO Lu Yongchen has filed an initial Form 3, disclosing his beneficial ownership in the company. The filing details direct holdings of ordinary shares and several option-like positions with varying exercise prices and expiration dates. Additionally, it reveals an indirect holding of 315,661 ordinary shares through L&L Tomorrow Holdings Limited, a company wholly owned by Lu Yongchen.

feed.title: TOMI Environmental Solutions 10-K: $5.64M Revenue, $(0.19) EPS
feed.summary: TOMI Environmental Solutions reported fiscal 2025 net sales of $5.636 million and a basic and diluted loss per share of $(0.19), with revenue decline attributed to the timing of large equipment purchases. Despite lower sales, the company improved its gross profit margin to 54.6% and narrowed its net loss to $(3.749) million due to cost management and prior-year inventory adjustments. TOMI also highlighted strategic OEM partnerships, product expansion into new markets like aerospace and cell & gene therapy, and securing a significant commercial SIS installation.

feed.title: TOMI sales fell in 2025, but it says Q1 is already ahead
feed.summary: TOMI Environmental Solutions reported a revenue decline to $5.64M in 2025 from $7.74M in 2024, attributed to deferred capital expenditure projects by customers amidst economic uncertainties. Despite the sales drop, the company maintained a strong gross margin of approximately 55% and narrowed its net loss, while expanding internationally and growing its sales backlog. TOMI anticipates improved performance in Q1 2026, driven by a robust pipeline of integration projects and continued focus on global market expansion and operational efficiencies.

feed.title: TMFG Should I Buy
feed.summary: This article provides an analysis of the Motley Fool Global Opportunities ETF (TMFG), questioning whether it is a good investment. It presents current stock prices, an overview of financial data categories such as growth, profitability, and efficiency, and Wall Street analyst forecasts. The article indicates that analysts expect TMFG's stock price to rise, although specific data and ratings are not yet available.

feed.title: Exclusive:Top Public Companies Holding XRP
feed.summary: This CoinPedia report highlights public companies holding XRP, detailing their allocations, reasons for valuing XRP's cross-border payment infrastructure, and financial disclosures. Companies like SBI Holdings, Trident Digital Tech, and Webus International are identified, showcasing a growing trend of corporate treasury commitments to XRP despite current unrealized losses. The article also provides a hypothetical gain/loss statement for these companies' XRP holdings.

feed.title: Grand opening at Timberland Bancorp draws visitors as giveaway winner announced
feed.summary: Timberland Bancorp hosted a grand opening event for its new branch at 6916 19th St W in University Place, during which Carli Lawlor was announced as the winner of the Big Green Egg giveaway. The event engaged local officials and community members, highlighting the company's commitment to community involvement. Simultaneously, Timberland Bancorp continues to prioritize customer security by advising clients to be aware of increasing scam and fraud threats.

feed.title: [Form 4] HANOVER INSURANCE GROUP, INC. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: HANOVER INSURANCE GROUP, INC. (THG) Executive Vice President Salvatore J. Bryan reported an acquisition of 30.677 restricted stock units (RSUs) as a dividend-related award. These RSUs are part of the company’s 2022 Long-Term Incentive Plan and vest on the third anniversary of the original RSU grant date. Following this transaction, Bryan directly holds 29,069.276 shares of common stock.

feed.title: Hanover Insurance (NYSE: THG) EVP granted RSUs from dividend equivalents
feed.summary: Hanover Insurance Group Executive Vice President T. Lee received 13.522 restricted stock units (RSUs) as dividend equivalent rights on previously granted RSUs under the company’s 2022 Long-Term Incentive Plan. These RSUs will vest on the third anniversary of the original grant date, bringing Lee's direct holdings to 6,982.373 shares of common stock. This transaction is an award, not a market purchase or sale, and it reflects compensation tied to existing RSU awards.

feed.title: Dividend RSUs boost Hanover (NYSE: THG) EVP Lovely’s share awards
feed.summary: Hanover Insurance Group Executive Vice President David John Lovely received an additional equity award of 13.246 dividend-equivalent restricted stock units (RSUs) at $0.00 per share, increasing his direct holdings to 3,807.921 shares. This award is part of Hanover's 2022 Long-Term Incentive Plan, accruing from dividend equivalent rights on previously granted RSUs, and is considered a compensation-related accrual rather than a stock purchase. The RSUs will vest on the third anniversary of the original RSU grant date.

feed.title: Hanover Insurance (NYSE: THG) EVP receives 18.998 RSUs via dividend equivalents
feed.summary: Dennis Francis Kerrigan, EVP at Hanover Insurance Group (NYSE: THG), received 18.998 restricted stock units (RSUs) as dividend equivalent rights under the company's 2022 Long-Term Incentive Plan. These RSUs will vest on the third anniversary of the original RSU grant date, bringing Kerrigan's direct holdings to 11,987.721 shares. This transaction is categorized as a neutral filing impact and sentiment, reflecting an award rather than an open-market trade.

feed.title: TFPM: 2024 guidance dips on Cerro Lindo and Northparkes, but production and NAV growth remain strong
feed.summary: Triple Flag Precious Metals Corp. (TFPM) anticipates lower 2024 guidance due to factors at Cerro Lindo and Northparkes, despite projected production growth to 140,000–150,000 gold equivalent ounces by 2030. The company maintains strong cash flow, a debt-free balance sheet, and has made recent investments to support portfolio growth. This summary is AI-generated and requires verification.

feed.title: Proposed 3.88M share sale by Triple Flag Precious Metals (TFPM) via Goldman Sachs
feed.summary: Triple Flag Precious Metals Corp. (TFPM) has filed a Form 144, indicating a proposed sale of 3,880,000 common shares through Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC. The shares were originally issued on July 15, 2020, to Triple Flag Mining Aggregator S.à r.l. The filing notes a dollar figure of $127,535,600.00, but does not specify the exact timing or net proceeds of the sale.

feed.title: Pineal Capital Urges Teladoc Health Board Changes
feed.summary: Pineal Capital Management has sent an open letter to Teladoc Health's board, advocating for significant changes to its leadership and strategic direction. The investment firm, which holds a substantial stake in Teladoc, believes the current board and management lack the necessary expertise to navigate the evolving telehealth market effectively. Pineal Capital is pushing for a shift from aggressive expansion to a focus on profitability and increased shareholder value, a move that could significantly impact the future of the telehealth industry.

feed.title: Telomir Pharmaceuticals Regains Nasdaq Listing Rule Compliance
feed.summary: Telomir Pharmaceuticals Inc. (TELO) has announced it has regained compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5620(a) following its 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. This resolution stabilizes the company's Nasdaq listing status and removes uncertainty for investors. An analyst has rated TELO stock a Buy with an $8.00 price target.

feed.title: [ARS] TEVA PHARMACEUTICAL INDUSTRIES LTD SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article reports on an ARS SEC filing by Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. (TEVA) on March 31, 2026. The filing is categorized with low impact and neutral sentiment, and the article provides quick access to view the full PDF document and the original filing on SEC EDGAR. It also includes an overview of TEVA's stock data, rankings, and recent news and SEC filings.

feed.title: A Look At TriCo Bancshares (TCBK) Valuation After ESOP Shelf Registration Filing
feed.summary: TriCo Bancshares (TCBK) has filed a shelf registration for up to 1,200,000 shares for an employee stock ownership plan, totaling about $56.892 million. While the company's valuation, based on a P/E of 12.5x, appears overvalued compared to the US banks average, a Discounted Cash Flow model suggests the shares might be significantly undervalued at $47.09, sitting about 37.9% below an estimated fair value of $75.87. This presents a mixed signal for investors, highlighting the need to consider both current earnings multiples and long-term cash flow projections.

feed.title: Trico Bancshares (TCBK) EVP reports RSU vesting, new RSU and PSU grants
feed.summary: Trico Bancshares EVP Daniel K. Bailey reported recent equity compensation activities, including the vesting of 1,267 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) on March 30, 2026, with a portion withheld for tax liabilities. Additionally, on March 27, 2026, Bailey received new grants of 3,897 RSUs and 3,897 performance-based stock units (PSUs), which will vest over three years based on different criteria. These transactions bring his direct common stock holdings to 58,627.41 shares, alongside indirect holdings and outstanding awards.

feed.title: Insider Buying: Jorey Chernett Acquires 385,442 Shares of Neuronetics Inc (STIM)
feed.summary: Jorey Chernett, a 10% Owner of Neuronetics Inc (STIM), purchased 385,442 shares of the company on March 30, 2026, increasing his total holdings to 9,778,988 shares. This purchase is part of a trend where Chernett has acquired over 2.7 million shares in the past year, with no sales. Neuronetics Inc, trading at $1.25, is considered a "Possible Value Trap" based on its GF Value of $2.16.

feed.title: TCOM Investor Alert: Trip.com Group Limited Securities Fraud Lawsuit - Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action After Allegedly Concealing Monopoly Enforcement Risk: Levi & Korsinsky
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky is announcing a securities fraud lawsuit against Trip.com Group Limited (NASDAQ: TCOM) following a substantial drop in share price due to accusations of monopolistic practices by Chinese regulators. Investors who held TCOM ADSs between April 30, 2024, and January 13, 2026, are encouraged to consider lead plaintiff opportunities in the class action, with a deadline of May 11, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Trip.com understated the risk of anti-monopoly enforcement in its public filings despite prior regulatory attention.

feed.title: Sarepta Therapeutics Announces Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
feed.summary: Sarepta Therapeutics, Inc. announced that it granted equity awards consisting of 113,855 restricted stock units (RSUs) to 24 new employees hired in the first quarter of 2026. These awards were approved by the Compensation Committee and are considered a material inducement to employment, in accordance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). The RSUs will vest over four years, with one-fourth vesting each year, contingent on continued employment.

feed.title: SurgePays (SURG) files late-filing notice delaying 2025 Form 10-K
feed.summary: SurgePays, Inc. (SURG) has filed a Form 12b-25 with the SEC, indicating that it will be unable to file its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the year ended December 31, 2025, by the March 31, 2026 due date. The delay is attributed to the need for additional time to complete financial statements and for its independent registered public accounting firm to finalize the audit. SurgePays expects to submit the Annual Report within fifteen calendar days following the original prescribed filing date.

feed.title: Cousins Properties posts Q1 earnings April 29, call follows April 30
feed.summary: Cousins Properties (NYSE:CUZ) is set to release its first quarter 2026 earnings after market close on April 29, 2026. The company will host a conference call the following day, April 30, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET to discuss the results. Investors can access financial materials and a live webcast on Cousins' investor relations website, with a playback available through May 7, 2026.

feed.title: Tantech raises $2.15M, says cash will support working capital
feed.summary: Tantech Holdings Ltd. (NASDAQ: TANH) has successfully closed a registered direct offering and concurrent private placements, raising approximately $2.15 million in gross proceeds. The company issued over 7.1 million common units, each comprising one common share and two warrants, at $0.30 per unit. The net proceeds are intended for general corporate purposes and working capital.

feed.title: Steakholder Foods (STKH) VP receives 15,000 RSU equity award
feed.summary: Steakholder Foods Ltd.'s Vice President of Finance, Atia Oren Yosi, received a grant of 15,000 Restricted Share Units (RSUs) as reported in a Form 4 filing. These RSUs, which represent American Depositary Shares, will vest in equal quarterly installments over three years starting March 31, 2026, contingent on continued service. The filing also noted 188 RSUs from a prior award for informational purposes, with no new transaction.

feed.title: Tantech (TANH) director Qian Hongdao listed as insider with no trades
feed.summary: Tantech Holdings Ltd. director Qian Hongdao has been identified as an insider through a Form 3 filing, which is an initial statement of beneficial ownership. The filing indicates no reported transactions, derivative positions, or share holdings, serving primarily as an administrative disclosure of insider status without any current share activity. This means there were no buy or sell transactions, no derivative securities listed, and no specific share positions disclosed for Mr. Hongdao in this report.

feed.title: Virgin Galactic raises spaceflight ticket prices to $750K
feed.summary: Virgin Galactic has resumed selling tickets for its commercial spaceflights at a new price of $750,000, a significant increase from its previous rate. This decision comes after a two-year hiatus focused on building new SpaceShips, with the company's first new vessel nearing completion and ground testing scheduled for April. The company aims to ramp up its spaceflight cadence with the introduction of its Delta class SpaceShips designed for higher capacity and more frequent operations.

feed.title: Xylem to Release First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 28, 2026
feed.summary: Xylem Inc. (NYSE: XYL) will announce its first quarter 2026 financial results on April 28, 2026, at 6:55 a.m. ET. Senior management will host a conference call for investors at 9:00 a.m. ET, with replay options available. The company reported $9 billion in revenue in 2025 and focuses on global water solutions.

feed.title: LW Stock News Today | Earnings, Events & Price Alerts
feed.summary: This article provides recent news and events related to Lamb Weston (LW) stock, including announcements about Q3 earnings, market reactions to global events like de-escalations in Iran conflict and surging oil prices, and upcoming earnings expectations for various companies including Lamb Weston. It also covers earlier news such as strategic proposals from Starboard, changes in stake by Liberty One, executive appointments, and past stock performance.

feed.title: Should Labcorp’s Expanded Illumina Oncology Partnership Reshape the Precision Medicine Story for LH Investors?
feed.summary: Labcorp and Illumina have expanded their precision oncology partnership to enhance access to next-generation sequencing-based cancer tests, including co-commercializing both tissue and liquid biopsy options. This collaboration aims to support drugmakers and strengthen payer coverage for comprehensive genomic profiling. While the partnership reinforces Labcorp's oncology testing franchise, investors are cautioned that it may not significantly alter short-term financial sensitivities to reimbursement shifts or broader economic headwinds.

feed.title: Corning, Meta Launch $267M Expansion in Hickory to Power AI Growth
feed.summary: Corning Inc. and Meta Platforms have begun construction on a $267 million expansion in Hickory, North Carolina, to boost Corning's optical cable manufacturing capacity. This project, part of a $6 billion agreement between the two companies, aims to create 132 new jobs and will establish the world's largest fiber-optic manufacturing plant. The expansion addresses the surging demand for fiber, primarily driven by artificial intelligence technologies and advanced data centers, with Meta serving as the anchor customer.

feed.title: Direxion Daily Semiconductor Bull 3x Shares ETF Options Spot-On: On March 31st, 248.9K Contracts Were Traded, With 1.06 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On March 31st, the Direxion Daily Semiconductor Bull 3x Shares ETF (SOXL.US) saw significant options trading activity, with a total volume of 248.9K contracts. Call options slightly outnumbered put options. The open interest for SOXL reached approximately 1.06 million contracts, which represents a 103.61% increase compared to the average of the past 30 trading days.

feed.title: [ARS] SOUTH PLAINS FINANCIAL, INC. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an ARS SEC filing by South Plains Financial, Inc. (SPFI) on March 31, 2026, which is available as a PDF document. It also provides an overview of the company's recent news, SEC filings, and stock data including market cap, float, industry, and location. South Plains Financial is ranked #3121 by market cap and has recently announced a merger, community impact report, stock repurchase program, and its recognition as one of America's Best Banks by Forbes.

feed.title: Steakholder Foods (STKH) director discloses ADS and RSU holdings
feed.summary: Steakholder Foods Ltd. director Gerbi David filed an initial ownership report (Form 3) disclosing holdings of 319 restricted share units and 7,984 American Depositary Shares (ADS). Each ADS represents 4,000 ordinary shares, and the ADS position represents restricted share units that will vest in equal quarterly installments over three years, commencing September 30, 2023, subject to his continued service. The filing solely reflects ownership status and does not report any open-market purchases or sales.

feed.title: Silicon Valley Acquisition (NASDAQ: SVAQ) details $221.6M SPAC trust and 2027 deal deadline
feed.summary: Silicon Valley Acquisition Corp. (SVAQ) has filed its annual report (10-K), detailing a trust account balance of $221.55 million intended for an initial business combination. The SPAC completed its IPO, raising $215 million, and has until December 24, 2027, to finalize a deal, after which public shareholders can redeem their shares. The report outlines the company's acquisition criteria, financial position, and risks associated with SPAC operations, including competition and regulatory changes.

feed.title: Silicon Valley Acquisition 10-K: Net loss $0.343M, Trust cash $200.119M, EPS impact
feed.summary: Silicon Valley Acquisition (SVAQ) reported a net loss of $0.343 million for the period of July 21-December 31, 2025, due to non-operating structure costs and the absence of operating revenues. The company generated $0.119 million in interest income from its trust account, which holds $200.119 million designated for a business combination. SVAQ's activities have focused on its IPO, corporate formation, and preparing for a target acquisition.

feed.title: [Form 4] Suzano S.A. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: This article reports on an insider trading activity at Suzano S.A. (SUZ) based on a Form 4 filing. Maria Luiza de Oliveira Pinto, VP of Sustainability, Communication & Brand, received a grant of 8,706 cash-settled phantom shares on March 30, 2026, which vest on March 1, 2029. These phantom shares track the price of Suzano common shares and will be settled in cash upon vesting.

feed.title: ETFs Investing in Sasol Limited Sponsored ADR Stocks
feed.summary: This article lists several ETFs that invest in Sasol Limited Sponsored ADR stocks, providing details such as market value, weight, issuer, expense ratio, AUM, price, and performance. These ETFs aim to make investing in such stocks more accessible and offer diversified opportunities with lower risk. The listed funds include Avantis Emerging Markets Equity ETF, Amplify International Enhanced Dividend Income ETF, BNP Paribas Easy MSCI Emerging Min TE, Avantis Emerging Markets Value ETF, ActivePassive International Equity ETF, VanEck Africa Index ETF, Avantis Emerging Markets ex-China Equity ETF, and National Security Emerging Markets Index ETF.

feed.title: Seritage Growth Properties 10-K: Rental Income $17.6M, Net Cash Used in Ops $(34.9)M
feed.summary: Seritage Growth Properties reported rental income of $17.597 million and a net gain on sale of real estate of $20.342 million for the year, reflecting ongoing asset monetization. Despite these gains, the company experienced constrained operating cash flows, with net cash used in operating activities at $(34.903) million. Management continues to rebalance the portfolio through accelerated sales and strategic reassessment of development plans.

feed.title: Stereotaxis, Inc. expands remote robotic testing with TeleRobotic Test Drive launch
feed.summary: Stereotaxis, Inc. has introduced its TeleRobotic Test Drive, enabling remote access to its RoboticEP technology for prospective clients and partners. This initiative aims to increase accessibility and adoption of robotic electrophysiology solutions. The company previously announced plans to unveil new robotic EP technology at upcoming events like EHRA2026, highlighting its focus on innovation in remote and robotic EP.

feed.title: Sportsman's Warehouse 10-K: $1.21B Revenue, $(1.30) EPS
feed.summary: Sportsman's Warehouse reported fiscal year net sales of $1.21 billion and a net loss per share of $(1.30), a 1.0% revenue increase with a net loss of $(50.1) million. The company's profitability was impacted by a $17.8 million impairment charge. Strategic priorities include technology investments, inventory discipline, and pausing new store openings to restore profitability.

feed.title: SmartFinancial Elevates Cynthia Cain to Chief Operating Officer
feed.summary: SmartFinancial (SMBK) has promoted Cynthia Cain to Chief Operating Officer, a newly formalized role aimed at consolidating operational and technology functions to drive growth and innovation. Cain, formerly the Chief Accounting Officer, will oversee various departments including Operations, Technology, Data, and AI Governance. This move emphasizes SmartBank's commitment to strategic growth and operational excellence, reflecting a focus on leveraging internal talent and adapting to industry changes in the financial services sector.

feed.title: SOBR Safe schedules 2026 annual meeting for May 18, sets proposal deadlines
feed.summary: SOBR Safe, Inc. announced its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders will be held on May 18, 2026, with stock record holders as of April 10, 2026, eligible to vote. Shareholders wishing to submit proposals for the proxy statement must do so by April 9, 2026, and those soliciting proxies for director nominees by April 10, 2026. This announcement comes as the company's shares trade near their 52-week low, and follows recent extensions of executive employment agreements and the appointment of a new transfer agent.

feed.title: SOBR Safe (NASDAQ: SOBR) schedules 2026 annual meeting and proposal deadlines
feed.summary: SOBR Safe, Inc. has announced that its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders will be held on Monday, May 18, 2026. Stockholders record as of April 10, 2026, will be eligible to vote. The deadline for submitting proposals to be included in the proxy statement is April 9, 2026, and the deadline for director nominee notices under universal proxy rules is April 10, 2026.

feed.title: SOR Financials: Revenue Breakdown, Margins & Competitor Comparison
feed.summary: This article provides a financial overview of Source Capital Inc. (SOR), detailing its revenue breakdown, profitability margins, and a framework for competitor comparison. It highlights SOR's strong gross, operating, and net margins, indicating effective financial management.

Despite a lack of significant news or strong trading sentiment from hedge funds and insiders, the company's fundamentals support a long-term investment strategy.
